title: Trusted skin pack
description: Everyone in Trusted SMP has their skin model they can place down
body:
# Trusted skin pack
A resource pack containing the skins of all players on the minecraft server "SGC Trusted". These can be placed in the world using custom item models.

![Example of skins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ec7594d56ba709f41f24e0fd39d91345194c94.png)

New versions of this resource pack will automatically be released here, adding new players when they are added to the whitelist of the server.

# How do I create a player?
Simply rename any carved pumpkin to the username of the player you want. Please make sure you are using CIT as stated below. Also check that the player is whitelisted on SGC Trusted!

# Requierments (Only under 1.21.5)
This resource pack requires CIT. I recommend using [cit resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
But otherwise Optifine should work too
